title: Petastoma patelliferum

taxonomy: Petastoma patelliferum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Petastoma and is a member of the order Lamiales. Petastoma patelliferum's classification is closely related to other plants in the Gesneriaceae family, which are known for their unique characteristics and adaptations.
